THETREASURER-STEAL.title: Steal
THETREASURER-STEAL.description:
#Deal !D! damage. Gain *Gold equal to unblocked damage dealt.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-MONEY_EQUALS_POWER.title: Money = Power
THETREASURER-MONEY_EQUALS_POWER.descript: #Gain [E] at the start of your turn if *Gold > 100.
THETREASURER-MUG.title: Mug
THETREASURER-MUG.description:
#Deal !D! damage. If the enemy intends to attack, apply 2 *Weak and gain !GoldGain! *Gold.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-ALLOWANCE.title: Allowance
THETREASURER-RECAP.title: Recap
THETREASURER-RECAP.description:
#Choose a card in your *Discard Pile.
Add it to your *Hand and enchant it with *Spiral 1 this combat.
THETREASURER-TREASURE.title: Treasure
THETREASURER-TREASURE.description:
#Create a random common, uncommon, or rare *Resin *Relic.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-RANSOM.title: Ransom
THETREASURER-ACE_HIGH.title: Ace High
THETREASURER-ACE_HIGH.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If this card is enchanted, play it twice and remove its enchantment.
THETREASURER-BANKRUPTCY.title: Bankruptcy
THETREASURER-BANKRUPTCY.description:
#Lose ALL *Gold.
Enchant ALL cards in your hand with *Spiral 1 this combat.
Can only be played with 50 or more *Gold.
THETREASURER-BIG_SPENDER.title: Big Spender
THETREASURER-BIG_SPENDER.description:
#Lose !GoldLoss! *Gold.
Gain 2 [E].
Draw 3 cards.
Create a random *Resin *Relic.-+
Create a random rare *Resin *Relic.+
THETREASURER-BUY_OUT.title: Buy Out
THETREASURER-BUY_OUT.description:
#Lose *Gold equal to 15 times X.-
Create X random *Resin *Relics and draw X cards.-+
Lose *Gold equal to 15 times (X + 1).
Create X + 1 random *Resin *Relics and draw X + 1 cards.+
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM.title: Charm Form
THETREASURER-CHARM_FORM.description:
#When a card is drawn, apply a random enchantment to it for this combat.
*Ethereal.
THETREASURER-GAMBLING_ADDICTION.title: Gambling Addiction
THETREASURER-GAMBLING_ADDICTION.descript:
#At the start of each turn, lose 5-10 *Gold, gain 1 [E], and draw !DrawAmt! card(s).
If you lose ALL *Gold, you die.
THETREASURER-GETAWAY.title: Getaway
THETREASURER-GETAWAY.description: #When a *Power is played, enchant a random card in your hand with *Swift 2.
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI.title: Kintsugi
THETREASURER-KINTSUGI.description: #Whenever a *Resin *Relic is destroyed, gain 5 *Gold and enchant !EnchantCount! random card(s) in your hand with a random enchantment.
THETREASURER-LIFE_INSURANCE.title: Life Insurance
THETREASURER-LIFE_INSURANCE.description: #When you die, revive with 1 HP and lose !GoldLoss! *Gold.
THETREASURER-MANA_BUILD.title: Mana Build
THETREASURER-MANA_BUILD.description:
#Choose an enchanted card.
Remove its enchantment.
Gain !EnergyGain! [E] and draw 2 card(s).
THETREASURER-PERFECT_COUNTERFEIT.title: Perfect Counterfeit
THETREASURER-PERFECT_COUNTERFEIT.descrip:
#Deal !D! damage.
Create a *Resin copy of a random non-*Resin relic.
If this kills, keep the copy permanently.
THETREASURER-RAID.title: Raid
THETREASURER-SOLIDIFY.title: Solidify
THETREASURER-FROM_THE_ASHES.title: From the Ashes
THETREASURER-FROM_THE_ASHES.description:
#Deal 8 damage !Hits! time(s).
If this kills an enemy, create a random rare *Resin *Relic.
THETREASURER-STRIKE_TREASURER.title: Strike
THETREASURER-DEFEND_TREASURER.title: Defend
THETREASURER-COWER.title: Cower
THETREASURER-CAPTIVATE.title: Captivate
THETREASURER-CAPTIVATE.description:
#Gain !B! *Block.
If this card is enchanted, draw 2 cards.
THETREASURER-CHECK_SATCHEL.title: Check Satchel
THETREASURER-CHINA_BULL.title: China Bull
THETREASURER-COIN_TOSS.title: Coin Toss
THETREASURER-COIN_TOSS.description:
#Deal !D! damage !Hits! time(s) to ALL enemies.
Gain !GoldGain! *Gold.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-CRACKED_SHIELD.title: Cracked Shield
THETREASURER-CRACKED_SHIELD.description:
#Gain !B! *Block.
If a *Resin *Relic was destroyed this turn, apply !VulnAmt! *Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
THETREASURER-CRIPPLE.title: Cripple
THETREASURER-CRIPPLE.description: #Apply !WeakAmt! *Weak and !VulnAmt! *Vulnerable. The enemy loses !StrDownAmt! *Strength this turn.
THETREASURER-DEBT_COLLECT.title: Debt Collect
THETREASURER-DIRECT_DEPOSIT.title: Closing Time
THETREASURER-DIRECT_DEPOSIT.description: #Deal !D! damage !Hits! time(s). Create a random shop *Resin *Relic.
THETREASURER-ENCHANTED_STRIKE.title: Enchanted Strike
THETREASURER-ENCHANTED_STRIKE.descriptio:
#Deal !D! damage.
If this card is enchanted, deal !BonusDmg! more damage.
THETREASURER-G_CHECK.title: G Check
THETREASURER-G_CHECK.description:
#Deal !CD! damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, gain 10 *Gold and deal double damage.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-GIVE_UP.title: Give Up
THETREASURER-HELPING_HAND.title: Helping Hand
THETREASURER-HELPING_HAND.description:
#Gain !B! *Block.
Enchant a card in your *Hand with *Nimble 2 this combat.
THETREASURER-MELT_DOWN.title: Melt Down
THETREASURER-MELT_DOWN.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If a *Resin *Relic was destroyed this turn, deal !BonusDmg! more damage.
THETREASURER-EMERGENCY_FUND.title: Emergency Fund
THETREASURER-COMPOUND_INTEREST.title: Compound Interest
THETREASURER-COMPOUND_INTEREST.descripti: #At end of turn, gain -10%-+15%+ of your current *Gold (max 100).
THETREASURER-FINE_PRINT.title: Fine Print
THETREASURER-FINE_PRINT.description:
#Lose 20 *Gold. Choose a card in your *Hand. Enchant it with *Spiral 2 this turn.-
*Exhaust.-
THETREASURER-FORECLOSURE.title: Foreclosure
THETREASURER-FORECLOSURE.description:
#Deal damage equal to half your *Gold.+ to ALL enemies.+
Lose ALL *Gold.
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW.title: Arcane Flow
THETREASURER-ARCANE_FLOW.description: #The first enchanted card you play each turn costs 0.+ and draws 1.+
THETREASURER-ARTIFICE.title: Artifice
THETREASURER-ARTIFICE.description:
#Lose -80-+50+ *Gold. Choose a card in your *Hand to permanently enchant. If *Power, apply *Swift 2. If *Attack, apply *Sharp 2. If *Skill, apply *Nimble 2.
*Exhaust.
THETREASURER-BAG_SEARCH.title: Bag Search
THETREASURER-BAG_SEARCH.description:
#Choose a card from your *Draw Pile and add it to your *Hand.
Lose -10-+5+ *Gold.
THETREASURER-CASH_OUT.title: Cash Out
THETREASURER-CASH_OUT.description:
#Lose 15 *Gold.
Upgrade ALL cards in your hand for this combat.
-*Exhaust.-
THETREASURER-COUNTERFEIT.title: Counterfeit
THETREASURER-COUNTERFEIT.description: #Make a *Resin copy of -1 non Resin relic-+2 non Resin relics+.
THETREASURER-MAGIC_DAGGER.title: Magic Dagger
THETREASURER-PROPAGATE.title: Propagate
